text: I am the Evolution Scholar of Hesperia. Bring me beast relics and I shall evolve them.
I can evolve Lunar Wyvern into Astral Kraken.
I can evolve Astral Kraken into Ancient Cyclops.
I can evolve Solar Minotaur into Mystic Drake.
I can evolve Mystic Drake into Frozen Drake.

Choose a beast evolution.
